description: You are an Architectural Technologist preparing a phased renovation model for the ground floor of the pre-loaded FZK-Haus IFC model. Using a non-destructive workflow, assign the property 'Status' within 'Pset_WallCommon' to the existing walls: at least eight walls must be set to 'EXISTING' and at least one internal partition wall must be set to 'DEMOLISH'. Model a new 'IfcWall' element and assign its 'Status' property to 'NEW' within 'Pset_WallCommon'. Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_renovation_phased.ifc.
